diagrams.title: Scheduling Criteria Overview
diagrams.description: Five main scheduling criteria with their formulas and relationships
elements: CPU Utilization (CPU busy time / total time)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the five fundamental metrics for evaluating CPU scheduling algorithms

diagrams.title: Turnaround Time Composition
diagrams.description: Visual breakdown of turnaround time into waiting time and burst time components
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how turnaround time is constructed from waiting and execution components

diagrams.title: System Types and Priority Criteria
diagrams.description: Shows which scheduling criterion is most important for different system types
elements: All Systems → Fairness to some degree
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how system purpose determines which criteria to optimize
